name: ClawPlus Registry
description: Rust/WASM plugins for OpenClaw, sandboxed by WasmEdge and verified by SHA-256

plugins.name: ClawPlus Fast Search
plugins.description: Ripgrep-powered code and file search. Indexes your workspace in the background and answers queries in under 10 ms. Rust regex engine, no Node.js overhead. Exposes: search.query, search.web, search.index.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus FS Tools
plugins.description: Safe filesystem operations: read, write, list, stat, copy, rename — all sandboxed to the configured workspace directory. Exposes: fs.readFile, fs.readDir, fs.stat, fs.writeFile, fs.copy, fs.rename.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Web Fetch
plugins.description: HTTP/HTTPS fetch with allowlist enforcement, response caching, and screenshot capture. All outbound hosts are checked against the security policy before connecting. Exposes: web.fetch, web.screenshot.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Git Bridge
plugins.description: Safe git operations (status, diff, log, commit, push, pull) with per-operation confirmation dialogs. Uses libgit2 compiled to WASM — no shell exec required. Exposes: git.status, git.diff, git.commit, git.push, git.pull, git.log.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Knowledge Base
plugins.description: Local vector-search knowledge base. Indexes documents from your workspace and answers semantic queries without sending data to external servers. Exposes: knowledge.query, knowledge.retrieve, knowledge.index.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Shell Safe
plugins.description: Sandboxed shell execution with allowlist-based command filtering, resource limits, and mandatory confirmation for every invocation. Replaces the default shell.exec with a safer variant that cannot escape the sandbox. Exposes: shell.exec (safe variant).
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Notifications
plugins.description: Cross-platform desktop notifications (macOS, Linux, Windows) triggered by agent events. Supports sound, urgency levels, and action buttons. Exposes: notify.send, notify.clear.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Crypto Tools
plugins.description: AES-256-GCM encryption, SHA-3 hashing, and Ed25519 signing for files and messages. All operations run inside the WasmEdge sandbox — private keys never leave the sandbox. Exposes: crypto.encrypt, crypto.decrypt, crypto.hash, crypto.sign, crypto.verify.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Downloader
plugins.description: High-performance multi-connection file downloader with zero-copy streaming, automatic resume, and progress reporting. Built in Rust — 10x faster than the default JS downloader. Exposes: download.fetch, download.resume, download.cancel.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors

plugins.name: ClawPlus Audit Logger
plugins.description: Structured NDJSON audit log for every file, network, and shell operation. Exports to syslog, S3, or a local rotating file. Zero runtime overhead via lock-free ring buffer. Exposes: audit.query, audit.export, audit.clear.
plugins.author: ClawPlus Contributors
